title: CASOMAN 14 Pieces 1/2-Inch Drive Standard Impact Socket Set, Metric, 6-Point, 11mm to 32mm
features: Made from drop forged and heat treated chrome vanadium steel(50BV30) with a corrosion-resistant black phosphate finish
6-point flank drive design grips fastener more tightly on the flat sides and prevents rounding off at corners.
Permanent high visibility laser etched size marking on each socket for quick size selection when working.
Meets or exceeds DIN performance standards. It comes with 1 year quality warranty.
description: Product Description Set Include: 1/2-Inch drive Shallow impact socket set: 11mm, 12mm, 13mm, 14mm, 15mm, 17mm, 18mm, 19mm, 21mm, 22mm, 24mm, 27mm, 30mm, 32mm CASOMAM 14 Pieces 1/2-Inch Drive Shallow Impact Socket Set, Metric, 6-Point, 11mm to 32mm Description The CASOMAM 14 Pieces 1/2-Inch Drive Shallow Impact Socket Set, CR-MO, Metric, 11mm to 32mm, which is made from drop forged and heat treated CR-V with a corrosion-resistant black phosphate finish, 6-point flank drive design grips fastener more tightly on the flat sides and prevents rounding off at corners. 6-point flank drive design grips fastener more tightly on the flat sides and prevents rounding off at corners. Permanent high visibility laser etched size marking on each socket for quick size selection when working. Flex socket design, provides more access to fasteners in tight confines.
